reviews.comment:
Si algún día vuelvo por estas rutas este ACA /Ypf es parada segura. Tiene muy buena atención. Baños bien amplios ventilados y limpios. Todo lo q encontrás además en una Ypf sumado a que tiene una zona de descanso hermosa! Tiene mesas y lugar para comer tranquilo o descansar y estirar las piernas. Recomiendo una caminata por la parte de atrás. Tiene un bosquecito que parece de cuento. Ideal si viajan con mascotas. Siempre recuerden dejar este lugar limpio. Así lo seguimos disfrutando todos.

(Translated by Google)
If I ever travel these roads again, this ACA/YPF station is a definite stop. The service is excellent. The restrooms are spacious, well-ventilated, and clean. It has everything you'd expect from a YPF station, plus a lovely rest area! There are tables and a place to eat peacefully or relax and stretch your legs. I recommend a walk around the back. It has a little wooded area that looks like something out of a fairy tale. It's ideal if you're traveling with pets. Please remember to leave this place clean so we can all continue to enjoy it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtLXBEaVh3EAE

reviews.comment:
Todo bien. El playero se esmeró en atenderme, atras.mio vayeron 3 autos y alguno no quiso esperar.
Solo con la.computadora para.procesar los.pagos dentro de la.oficina.
Cada compra era mucha demora administrativa.

(Translated by Google)
Everything was fine. The attendant was very helpful. There were three cars behind me, and some didn't want to wait.
They only have the computer to process payments inside the office. Each purchase involved a lot of administrative delay.
